name: Barbequed (in a Skillet) Franks from Brigitte Sealing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients, except the franks, well in a bowl.
2. Place a skillet over medium heat and pour in the mixture.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Add the franks to the skillet and reduce heat to low.
5. Simmer for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove from heat and serve hot.
